_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for CANVAS physicians. Display order = array order. After editing, run: python3 scripts/update-physicians.py — it regenerates the homepage team grid and physician count, the physician schema graph, doctors/index.html cards and ItemList, and the physician link row on every treatment page. Individual profile pages under doctors/<slug>/ are authored separately.

physicians.name: Dr. Tan Chin Loon
physicians.bio: Expert in advanced injectables, skin biostimulation and anti-ageing protocols. Committed to precision and patient comfort.
physicians.hub_desc: Aesthetic Physician · MD(UCSI), Dip. Aesthetic Medicine (AAAM, USA). Advanced injectables and anti-ageing.

physicians.name: Dr. Samuel Tong
physicians.bio: Specialist in facial aesthetics and non-surgical rejuvenation. Known for natural, balanced results tailored to each patient's unique anatomy.
physicians.hub_desc: Aesthetic Physician · MBBChBAO(NUI, RCSI), LCP Certified. Facial aesthetics and non-surgical rejuvenation.

physicians.name: Dr. Nicole Tham Hooi Ming
physicians.bio: Aesthetic physician with a gentle, detail-led approach to injectables, skin health and facial harmony — focused on natural results and patient comfort.
physicians.hub_desc: Aesthetic Physician · MBBS(IMU). Natural-looking injectables, skin health and facial harmony.

physicians.name: Dr. Andre Mooy Kai En
physicians.bio: Aesthetic physician practising the full range of injectables and skin-quality treatments, with a dermatology diploma that brings a skin-health perspective to natural facial rejuvenation.
physicians.hub_desc: Aesthetic Physician · MBBS(AIMST), Dip.Derm(AFPM), MAC. Full-range aesthetics with a skin-health and dermatology perspective.

physicians.name: Dr. Annabelle Ng Ee Ming
physicians.bio: Aesthetic physician pairing careful assessment with tailored treatment plans — balanced, natural-looking rejuvenation on sensible timelines.
physicians.hub_desc: Aesthetic Physician · MBBS(AIMST). Tailored treatment plans and balanced, natural rejuvenation.

physicians.name: Dr. Kang Eik Hong
physicians.bio: Specialises in facial rejuvenation, body sculpting, IV therapy and comprehensive aesthetic wellness protocols for long-lasting results.
physicians.hub_desc: Aesthetic Physician · MBBS(UTAR). Facial rejuvenation, body sculpting, IV therapy and wellness.

physicians.name: Dr. Chong Jee Can
physicians.bio: Dermatology physician focused on medical skin conditions, laser treatments and advanced dermatological care.
physicians.hub_desc: Dermatology Physician · MBBS, MRCP(UK), MRCP(Edinburgh). Medical skin conditions and laser care.

physicians.name: Dr. Tan Jin Zhi
physicians.bio: Aesthetic physician focused on careful assessment and natural-looking results, guiding patients through their options with a measured, patient-first approach.
physicians.hub_desc: Aesthetic Physician · MBBS(AIMST). Careful assessment and natural, patient-first care.
